description: CompositionBlack and grey striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the upper left chest and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careDry clean onlyThe black vertical stripes adds sophisticated styling to this grey shirt from turtle. The soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the fashionable cuts offer a flattering silhouette. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with black formal pants and classy accessories.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
